commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps shared channel message action discovery reads in guarded fallbacks and adds focused malformed-plugin regression tests for schema, action, and property discovery.

PR surface: Source +176, Tests +233. Total +409 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main reads plugin discovery fields and schema/property maps directly, and the PR adds focused throwing-getter cases that model the crash. I did not execute a failing test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and undraft handling for a protected maintainer PR.

target.title: fix(channels): harden message action schema discovery
target.body:
## Summary
- Harden channel message action discovery against plugin-returned getters/proxies that throw while reading discovery fields.
- Keep cross-channel message actions conservative when current-channel schema action lists are unreadable.
- Preserve healthy schema contributions, array entries, and property fields when sibling discovery reads throw.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD -- src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Remote proof status:
- `blacksmith testbox list --all` is blocked by missing Blacksmith authentication in this environment.
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 5m --ttl 20m --timing-json --shell -- "pwd >/dev/null"` failed before lease creation with coordinator HTTP 401 on `/v1/runs` and `/v1/leases`; no Crabbox run ID was allocated.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: malformed channel plugin `describeMessageTool` discovery output can no longer crash message-tool schema/action discovery through throwing getters on discovery fields, schema contribution arrays, schema action lists, or schema property maps.
Real environment tested: focused channel plugin message-action test lane in a linked OpenClaw worktree with symlinked dependencies; remote Testbox/Crabbox proof attempted but blocked by authentication before execution.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest, oxfmt, oxlint, diff-check, and branch autoreview commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: focused channel plugin message-action tests passed with 14 tests; formatter/lint/diff checks passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: unreadable discovery fragments are logged once and skipped or fail closed, while healthy actions/schema fields remain available when safe.
What was not tested: no live third-party channel plugin runtime and no remote changed gate, because both available remote runner paths are blocked by auth in this environment.
target.author: vincentkoc
